info.value: Hello, my dear students. I have some exciting news to tell you. A new student is coming to our class next week. His name is Tony and he is 14 years old. He comes from Australia, a beautiful country on the other side of the earth. Tony will study all the subjects with us together. His favorite subjects are Chinese and art. He can write beautiful Chinese characters and draw traditional Chinese paintings. Tony is arriving at Daxing Airport at 7:00 on Tuesday. Some of us will go to the airport to welcome him. I hope we can all make Tony feel at home.
